header.name: Bella (JiEun) Kim
home.title: Frontend-focused Full-Stack Engineer with 3+ years of experience building user-centric web applications, dedicated to creating reliable and scalable products.
home.description.short: Specialized in React, TypeScript, Node.js, and MongoDB. Proven record of improving user satisfaction by 59% through data-driven UX optimization. Passionate about creating delightful digital experiences, leading cross-functional teams, and mentoring developers.
home.description.more: I find my greatest satisfaction in leveraging technology to solve business problems and deliver tangible value to users. I strive to go beyond mere feature implementation, focusing instead on designing scalable, stable architectures and conducting in-depth analysis to resolve the root causes of issues that impede the user experience. I'm also a strong testing culture advocate with expertise in Jest, React Testing Library, and Playwright E2E testing.
home.techStack.title: Technical Skills
home.techStack.proficient.title: Proficient
home.techStack.exposure.title: Exposure
experience.title: Professional Experiences
experience.goorm.subtitle: Provide coding test platform as Edu-Tech
experience.goorm.desc.1: Designed and implemented AI Assistant modules using React and TypeScript, improving onboarding speed by 56% and raising user satisfaction scores from 2.3 to 4.3 out of 5.
experience.goorm.desc.2: Led full renewal of DEVTH exam platform — migrated jQuery/EJS to TypeScript + Vapor-UI, reducing redundant API calls from 100 to 1 per operation and cutting response time by 0.5s.
experience.goorm.desc.3: Built E2E and integration test suites using Playwright and React Testing Library; developed an Appsmith-based internal admin tool that eliminated developer dependency for the CX team, reducing request-to-publish time from days to minutes.
experience.goorm.desc.4: Independently built a latecomer restriction system, completing a 3 man-month project in 1 month and improving exam security.
experience.goorm.desc.5: Led MongoDB schema design for global SaaS platform; implemented i18n locale handling for multi-language and timezone support; integrated Google Tag Manager (GTM) for data-driven user engagement tracking.
experience.posco.desc.1: Enhanced and maintained ERP purchasing systems, reducing customer support requests by 70% through UI/UX improvements and data integrity fixes — using React.js, Spring Boot, Oracle, and PostgreSQL.
experience.posco.desc.2: Delivered an AI-based raw material price prediction service end-to-end; built RESTful APIs with Spring Boot, managed 55,000+ data points, and deployed ML models on AWS SageMaker (EC2, S3, Lambda).
experience.posco.desc.3: Developed 7 data crawlers in Java and Python (Pandas) to collect global raw material market data for accurate model training.
experience.posco.desc.4: Optimized multi-database transaction flows across Oracle and PostgreSQL to ensure data integrity in complex procurement workflows.
experience.posco.desc.5: Awarded Outstanding New Employee Award for outstanding project contributions and technical troubleshooting.
about.title: About Me
about.paragraph: I find my greatest satisfaction in leveraging technology to solve business problems and deliver tangible value to users. I strive to go beyond mere feature implementation, focusing instead on designing scalable, stable architectures and conducting in-depth analysis to resolve the root causes of issues that impede the user experience. I firmly believe that collaborative growth and knowledge sharing are essential to a team's success, and I aim to contribute by using my technical leadership and clear communication to unlock the team's full potential.
